name: CFmon.cllcalipsoSouth30
title: CALIPSO Low Level Cloud Cover Percentage
description: Percentage cloud cover in layer centred on 840hPa
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean where air,
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.cllcalipsoSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
